summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuildMap iteration 7 features: Multi-provider API support (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI) and InteractiveMindMap component. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified 4 provider options in API dialog, provider selection changes placeholder, connected providers show delete button, project page loads with chat interface and side panel.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/providers returns 4 providers (openrouter, openai, anthropic, google)
Backend: Providers have required fields (id, name, name_ar, key_prefix, key_help_url)
Backend: Provider key prefixes are correct (sk-or-, sk-, sk-ant-, AI)
Backend: GET /api/api-keys returns providers array with configured providers
Backend: GET /api/api-keys maintains backward compatibility fields
Backend: POST /api/api-keys accepts provider field
Backend: POST /api/api-keys rejects invalid provider
Backend: DELETE /api/api-keys/{provider} endpoint exists and works
Backend: GET /api/models returns aggregated models from configured providers
Backend: Models have required fields (id, name, provider, is_free, context_length, source)
Backend: Models include source field indicating provider origin
Backend: Models sorted with free models first
Backend: GET /api/models without auth returns default models
Backend: Streaming endpoint exists and returns proper content type
Backend: All API key endpoints require authentication
Frontend: Login flow works with test credentials
Frontend: Dashboard loads and shows 5 projects
Frontend: API Key dialog shows 4 provider options (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI)
Frontend: Selecting different providers changes input placeholder (sk-..., sk-ant-..., AI...)
Frontend: Connected providers show with delete button in dialog
Frontend: Project page loads with chat interface (8 messages)
Frontend: Chat input and send button present
Frontend: Model select dropdown present
Frontend: Side panel displays project summary with features, technologies, verification
Frontend: Quick suggestions visible (4 found)
Frontend: InteractiveMindMap component properly imported and integrated
seed_data_creation: Test user test@buildmap.com already exists with OpenRouter API key configured
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 7 are working: 1) Multi-provider API support - GET /api/providers returns 4 providers, POST /api/api-keys accepts provider field, GET /api/api-keys returns providers array, DELETE /api/api-keys/{provider} deletes specific provider key, GET /api/models aggregates models from all configured providers. 2) Frontend API Key dialog shows 4 provider cards with correct placeholders and help links. 3) InteractiveMindMap component using @xyflow/react is properly imported and integrated - will render when project has outputs with mindmap data. Note: No projects currently have outputs, so mindmap rendering couldn't be visually tested, but component integration is verified.

endpoints.GET /api/providers: Returns 4 providers with id, name, name_ar, key_prefix, key_help_url
endpoints.POST /api/api-keys: Accepts provider field (openrouter, openai, anthropic, google)
endpoints.GET /api/api-keys: Returns providers array with each configured provider
endpoints.GET /api/models: Aggregates models from all configured providers

features.provider_grid: 4 provider cards in API Key dialog
features.placeholder_change: Input placeholder changes based on selected provider
features.connected_providers: Shows connected providers with delete button
features.help_links: Links to provider API key pages

interactive_mindmap.note: Component properly imported and integrated, will render when mindmap data exists
